exceptions.reason: Reflected XSS via unescaped View Transition animation properties. The documentation site is a static Astro build (284 prerendered pages plus a prebuilt Pagefind index) with no SSR and no request-time rendering, and the transition properties come from repository-authored content, never from visitor input — so the vulnerable path has no attacker-controlled source.
exceptions.control: docs-app builds with `astro build` and is served as static files; no server-side rendering is enabled, and content is limited to reviewed repository Markdown.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove with the Astro 7 migration. The only fix is astro@7.1.3 (major), which is held as its own reviewed migration (PRs #60/#111) per spec 056 US3 — major upgrades are isolated from remediation, not bundled into it.

exceptions.reason: XSS via unescaped transition:* directive values on hydrated islands. The directive values in this site are authored in the repository; a static build exposes no path for a visitor to supply them.
exceptions.control: Static `astro build` output served as files; no SSR and no visitor-controlled directive values.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove with the Astro 7 migration (astro@7.1.3, major — held as its own reviewed migration per spec 056 US3).

exceptions.reason: XSS via unescaped spread attribute names in renderHTMLElement (incomplete fix for CVE-2026-54298). Attribute names in this static docs build originate from repository-authored components, not from visitor input, and there is no request-time rendering to reflect anything into.
exceptions.control: Static `astro build` output served as files; no SSR, no user-supplied component props, content limited to reviewed repository Markdown.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove with the Astro 7 migration (astro@7.1.3, major — held as its own reviewed migration per spec 056 US3).

exceptions.reason: sharp inherits libvips CVEs (CVE-2026-33327/33328/35590/35591). sharp runs only during `astro build`, optimizing images committed to this repository; the built site ships static image files and does not carry sharp or process visitor uploads.
exceptions.control: Image inputs are repository assets reviewed in pull requests, never visitor uploads; a failure here breaks a docs build rather than a served page.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when astro resolves sharp >=0.35.0. The available fix is astro@7.1.3 (major), held as its own reviewed migration per spec 056 US3.

exceptions.reason: The advisory affects the Windows development server; the published docs are static build output and do not include the server.
exceptions.control: Bind the docs development server to loopback, do not expose it to untrusted networks, and stop it after local use.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when the supported Astro/Vite line resolves esbuild 0.28.1 or newer.

exceptions.reason: linkify-it is a transitive dependency of the repository Markdown linter (@wordpress/scripts → markdownlint-cli → markdown-it → linkify-it). Its quadratic match loop is reachable only when linting repository-controlled Markdown, and the package is not bundled into or shipped to any WordPress site.
exceptions.control: Lint only reviewed repository Markdown files; pull-request CI uses a read-only token, processes no untrusted input, and receives no production secrets.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when @wordpress/scripts resolves a linkify-it release that fixes GHSA-22p9-wv53-3rq4 without a semver-major downgrade.

exceptions.reason: The affected matcher is reachable only through the repository Markdown linter and is not shipped to WordPress sites.
exceptions.control: Lint only reviewed repository files; pull-request CI uses a read-only token and receives no production secrets.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when the @wordpress/scripts Markdown lint path resolves minimatch 3.1.4 or newer.

exceptions.reason: The affected matcher is reachable only through the repository Markdown linter and is not shipped to WordPress sites.
exceptions.control: Lint only reviewed repository files; pull-request CI uses a read-only token and receives no production secrets.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when the @wordpress/scripts Markdown lint path resolves minimatch 3.1.3 or newer.

exceptions.reason: The affected server is a local @wordpress/scripts development dependency and is absent from shipped plugin assets.
exceptions.control: Bind development servers to loopback, never expose them to untrusted networks, and avoid untrusted sites while they run.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when @wordpress/scripts provides webpack-dev-server 5.2.5 or newer.

exceptions.reason: The serializer is reached through copy-webpack-plugin with repository-controlled build configuration and assets, not runtime input.
exceptions.control: Build only reviewed repository source; pull-request CI uses a read-only token and receives no production secrets.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when the @wordpress/scripts copy-webpack-plugin path resolves serialize-javascript 7.0.5 or newer.

exceptions.reason: The parser is used by repository Markdown linting and does not process user content in shipped Corex runtime.
exceptions.control: Lint only reviewed repository documentation; pull-request CI uses a read-only token and receives no production secrets.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when the @wordpress/scripts Markdown lint path resolves markdown-it above 14.1.1.

exceptions.reason: The affected server is a local @wordpress/scripts development dependency and is absent from shipped plugin assets.
exceptions.control: Bind development servers to loopback, use HTTPS where supported, and never expose them to untrusted networks.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when @wordpress/scripts provides webpack-dev-server 5.2.5 or newer.

exceptions.reason: The affected matcher is reachable only through the repository Markdown linter and is not shipped to WordPress sites.
exceptions.control: Lint only reviewed repository files; pull-request CI uses a read-only token and receives no production secrets.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when the @wordpress/scripts Markdown lint path resolves minimatch 3.1.3 or newer.

exceptions.reason: The affected server is a local @wordpress/scripts development dependency and is absent from shipped plugin assets.
exceptions.control: Bind development servers to loopback, never expose them to untrusted networks, and avoid untrusted sites while they run.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when @wordpress/scripts provides webpack-dev-server 5.2.5 or newer.

exceptions.reason: CSRF against the dev server's internal developer endpoints. webpack-dev-server runs only under `npm start` on a developer machine; it is never part of a build artifact or a deployed site. Same exposure boundary as the four webpack-dev-server exceptions already recorded here.
exceptions.control: The dev server is bound to localhost and must not be exposed to an untrusted network; production and CI builds use `wp-scripts build`, which never starts it.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when @wordpress/scripts depends on a webpack-dev-server release above 5.2.6. npm reports a non-major fix, but it cannot be applied while @wordpress/scripts pins the vulnerable range.

exceptions.reason: Denial of service via a malformed Host or Origin header against the local dev server. Same boundary as GHSA-f5vj-f2hx-8m93 above: the process exists only during `npm start` on a developer machine.
exceptions.control: Bound to localhost and not exposed to untrusted networks; a crash costs a developer a restart and cannot affect a served site or a release artifact.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when @wordpress/scripts depends on a webpack-dev-server release above 5.2.6.

exceptions.reason: The affected server is a local @wordpress/scripts development dependency and is absent from shipped plugin assets.
exceptions.control: Bind development servers to loopback and do not use permissive user-controlled proxies while HMR is active.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when @wordpress/scripts provides webpack-dev-server 5.2.5 or newer.

exceptions.reason: The serializer is reached through copy-webpack-plugin with repository-controlled build configuration and assets, not runtime input.
exceptions.control: Build only reviewed repository source; pull-request CI uses a read-only token and receives no production secrets.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when the @wordpress/scripts copy-webpack-plugin path resolves serialize-javascript 7.0.5 or newer.

exceptions.reason: Quadratic-complexity DoS in the mailto: validator when scanning attacker-supplied text. linkify-it is reached only via markdown-it under the repository Markdown linter, which reads files already committed to this repository. Matches the existing bounded exception for GHSA-22p9-wv53-3rq4 on the same package and path.
exceptions.control: The linter runs only over reviewed repository Markdown; pull-request CI uses a read-only token and receives no production secrets. Nothing is shipped to sites.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when @wordpress/scripts ships a release whose dependency tree resolves this advisory. npm reports the only "fix" as @wordpress/scripts@19.2.4 — a downgrade from the pinned ^32.4.1 — which spec 056 US1 scenario 3 rejects without a reviewed migration.

exceptions.reason: UUID is reached through sockjs in the local webpack development server and is absent from shipped assets.
exceptions.control: Bind development servers to loopback, do not expose sockjs to untrusted networks, and do not supply external UUID buffers.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when the @wordpress/scripts webpack-dev-server/sockjs path resolves uuid 11.1.1 or newer.

exceptions.reason: A crafted ZIP can force a 4GB allocation. adm-zip is reachable only through @wordpress/env and @wordpress/scripts, which unpack WordPress and plugin archives fetched from WordPress.org during local development and CI. No Corex runtime code unpacks an archive, so nothing here reaches a shipped WordPress site.
exceptions.control: The archives unpacked are release downloads from WordPress.org over TLS, not visitor-supplied uploads; a memory exhaustion in that path fails a local build or a CI job and cannot affect a served site.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when @wordpress/scripts ships a release whose dependency tree resolves this advisory. npm reports the only "fix" as @wordpress/scripts@19.2.4 — a downgrade from the pinned ^32.4.1 — which spec 056 US1 scenario 3 rejects without a reviewed migration.
